notes: Estimator error bound: uncontrolled; upgrade tracked by ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE (GAP-2 instance). Migration batch 2 re-validated 2026-06-05: 167/167 asserts across the eight enumerated-reading scripts (LAM/HEX/FCC races, Bloch log-det, inhomogeneous Wick, dense surface, two-shell ensemble, LAM/HEX exact-Wick brackets); all regenerated artefacts identical to archive within 1e-9 (claims/B1-RH-ENUM/runs/260605-migration-revalidation/). Migration-clean: no legacy: pointers remain. INCIDENT 2026-06-06: an autonomous-agent tool-layer write truncated this card mid-string (CLAUDE.md sec-2 defect class). Restored from git HEAD plus this session's verified AddB-AddE field values (each passed lint/catalog/release/pytest at its turn). The autonomous U1-U16 notes remain on disk as UNVERIFIED DRAFTS (PDFs/linter pending) and did NOT modify this card. U-SERIES TRIAGE 2026-06-06 (useries-triage-260606-v1.0): the autonomous verification script ran 52/57 on first execution; 5 FAILs classified — 1 typo (m_w 0.0392414->0.0392407), 1 factor-2 error (M'=-J(0)/2 not -J(0); U7/U10), 1 estimate slip (U7 endpoint ratio 1.13 not 1.34, still >1), 1 x60 overclaim (near-gap remainder 1.65e-3 not 2.7e-5; U11), 1 UPHELD BLOCKER (R-U10-3: near-gap endpoint protection x2 not x100/x130). Script corrected to assert truth (v0.2.0, 57/57). CONSEQUENCE: the U1 Reading-H T6-CONDITIONAL proposal is BLOCKED-pending-repair on the near-gap small-amplitude endpoint (confirms U9 G-U1-SMALLT); x2>1 so not falsified, but too thin for promotion. Repair options registered (sharper kernel / min-amplitude restriction / explicit x2-conditional T6) — operator choice. All 16 autonomous notes now build clean PDFs (FORM-CHECK PASS, Overfull 0); zero truncation found. R-U10-3 RESOLVED 2026-06-06 (neargap-common-mode-resolution-260606-v1.0, script neargap_common_mode_repair.py 14/14): the near-gap x2 was a mis-subtraction — at fixed I the diagonal dressing r_hat(I)=rR+2lam'I is PATTERN-INDEPENDENT, so P and R_H share D_0 and F[P]-F[R_H] = (1/2)Tr[ln(D_0+lam'P^2)-ln D_0] >= 0 UNCONDITIONALLY (lam'P^2 PSD, ln operator-monotone). The convention remainder (1.65e-3) is COMMON-MODE (dressing-swap changes dF by 0.4%, x282 below the margin) and cancels. Near-gap sweep to I=1e-5: floor holds, no thinning. The U1 T6-CONDITIONAL proposal is UN-BLOCKED on the near-gap axis; B1 stays T5 pending operator sign-off; named hypotheses {H-LAYER,H-A0,H-ADM-COH,SC-SCOPE} unchanged. PROMOTED T5 -> T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} 2026-06-06 (operator-authorized, directive 'proceed with item 1'; note reading-h-t6-entry v2.0). Self-adversarial review (5 objections: case-split consistency, SC-SCOPE substantiveness, ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE, H-A0 non-circularity, enumerated-scope) — none UPHELD as blocker. STEP-5B removed from open_gates (CLOSED-CONDITIONAL; its condition H-ADM-COH carried as a named hypothesis). H-ADM-COH + SC-SCOPE registered in GATES.md this turn.
title: Reading-H selection within enumerated condensate ensembles
statement: Reading-H is selected among all admissible competitors of the H-ADM-COH amended class: $F_{\rm total}[P] > F_{\rm total}[R_H]$ at matched second-cumulant scope. Proof = case split — bulk via the layer margin (Proposition A, $m=+4.32\times10^{-3}$) plus the beyond-layer bound (STEP-5B closure, floors $\times59.4/\times8.8/\times2.6$); near-gap small-amplitude via the structural floor $F_{\rm fluct}[P]-F_{\rm fluct}[R_H]=\tfrac12\mathrm{Tr}[\ln(D_0+\lambda'P^2)-\ln D_0]\ge0$ (R-001/R-U10-3, unconditional). The T6 statement is the selection SIGN; quantitative margins remain estimator-grade (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE).
scope: T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} (operator-authorized 2026-06-06, directive 'proceed with item 1'). Class-wide over the H-ADM-COH amended class; second-cumulant order; selection SIGN only. NOT unconditional (H-ADM-COH; unrestricted = DR-2 research-grade), NOT all-orders (SC-SCOPE substantive — third-cumulant endpoint marginal), NOT a precise-margin claim (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE), NOT mu^2-robust (ROBUSTNESS-MU2).
falsifier: An admissible competitor of the H-ADM-COH class with F_total <= F_total[R_H]; a near-gap section with the structural floor < 0; or the loss of any named hypothesis {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE}.
no_overclaim: T6 is the selection SIGN modulo four NAMED hypotheses, not an unconditional or all-orders result. SC-SCOPE is substantive (third-cumulant endpoint marginal); the precise margins are estimator-grade (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE open); mu^2-robustness open (ROBUSTNESS-MU2). The unrestricted-class selection is the DR-2 route (research-grade). No tier action on B5 (T5-CANDIDATE) by this note.
next_action: SC-SCOPE all-orders lift (per-transfer third-cumulant endpoint kernels); ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE (controlled-error quantitative margins); ROBUSTNESS-MU2 (mu^2-neighbourhood); standing operator decisions B5 full-T5 + H-A0->H-ANCHOR remain.
